emails.subject: News Flash
emails.body: News Flash Rusty Stevens is going to Entergy (darn, darn, darn). I'll bet they didn't check his references. K- Kathleen Carnahan Enron North America Corp. 1400 Smith Street, EB 3146d Houston, TX 77002 Phone (713) 345-3386 Fax (713) 646-3037
